title: Orlické Podhůří

infobox.value: is a municipality in the [Ústí nad Orlicí District](/wiki/%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD_District "Ústí nad Orlicí District") in the [Pardubice Region](/wiki/Pardubice_Region "Pardubice Region") of the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"). It has about 700 inhabitants.

["Population of Municipalities – 1 January 2025"](https://csu.gov.cz/produkty/population-of-municipalities-t4l3n8d2iw). [Czech Statistical Office](/wiki/Czech_Statistical_Office "Czech Statistical Office"). 2025-05-16.

["Public Census 2021 – basic data"](https://vdb.czso.cz/vdbvo2/faces/en/index.jsf?page=vystup-objekt-parametry&z=T&f=TABULKA&sp=A&skupId=4690&katalog=33475&pvo=SLD21043-CO). *Public Database* (in Czech). [Czech Statistical Office](/wiki/Czech_Statistical_Office "Czech Statistical Office"). 2022.

["Historický lexikon obcí České republiky 1869–2011"](https://csu.gov.cz/produkty/historicky-lexikon-obci-1869-az-2015) (in Czech). [Czech Statistical Office](/wiki/Czech_Statistical_Office "Czech Statistical Office"). 2015-12-21.

["Population Census 2021: Population by sex"](https://vdb.czso.cz/vdbvo2/faces/en/index.jsf?page=vystup-objekt-parametry&z=T&f=TABULKA&sp=A&skupId=4429&katalog=33515&pvo=SLD21001-OB-OK). *Public Database*. [Czech Statistical Office](/wiki/Czech_Statistical_Office "Czech Statistical Office"). 2021-03-27.

**Orlické Podhůří** is a municipality in the [Ústí nad Orlicí District](/wiki/%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD_District "Ústí nad Orlicí District") in the [Pardubice Region](/wiki/Pardubice_Region "Pardubice Region") of the [Czech Republic](/wiki/Czech_Republic "Czech Republic"). It has about 700 inhabitants.

Orlické Podhůří lies approximately 6 kilometres (4 mi) north-west of [Ústí nad Orlicí](/wiki/%C3%9Ast%C3%AD_nad_Orlic%C3%AD "Ústí nad Orlicí"), 40 km (25 mi) east of [Pardubice](/wiki/Pardubice "Pardubice"), and 138 km (86 mi) east of [Prague](/wiki/Prague "Prague").

## Administrative division

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Orlick%C3%A9_Podh%C5%AF%C5%99%C3%AD&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Administrative division")]

Orlické Podhůří consists of six municipal parts (in brackets population according to the 2021 census):[[2]](#cite_note-2)

* Dobrá Voda (75)
* Kaliště (17)
* Perná (27)
* Říčky (339)
* Rozsocha (68)
* Rviště (112)
